prompt: I just deployed a frontend change to the EAGLE app. Can you do a quick visual check of the admin dashboard and chat page to make sure nothing looks broken? Use the deployed URL.

assertions.text: Recognizes this as an e2e-judge task without the user naming the skill
Uses --journeys admin,chat (maps 'admin dashboard and chat page' to correct journey names)
Uses the deployed ALB URL as --base-url
Explains what pass/fail/warning verdicts mean in the output
Mentions cost estimate or that cached runs are cheaper
